subcodes.first_line: O Sadiq! Say: O friends! If ye partake of the Kawthar that floweth from the blessed word "Verily He is praiseworthy in His deeds and is to be obeyed" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا صادق بگو ای دوستان اگر از کوثریکه در کلمه مبارکه انه محمود فی فعله و مطاع
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the power of words; of speech, @meditation
